channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Trump Administration's $500 Billion AI Initiative: Questions Abound
item.description: The Trump administration's new initiative, Stargate, aims to build AI infrastructure across the US and create over 100,000 jobs. However, concerns about the project's feasibility and potential pitfalls have been raised.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
